description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small cluster of dark pixels, forming an object, is visible at the exact center of the reticle. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B19
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small cluster of dark pixels, forming an object, is visible at the exact center of the reticle.
reported_object_description: A small cluster of dark pixels, forming an object, visible at the exact center of a crosshair reticle in a monochrome, grainy image.
official_resolution: Operator reported inability to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The document provides only a single, low-quality, grainy, monochrome image showing a small, pixelated object at the center of a crosshair. There is no description of behavior, kinematics, or corroborating sensor data or witnesses. This lack of detail and corroboration makes it impossible to rule out numerous mundane explanations, placing it firmly in the high bust score range.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B19 - Page 1

[redacted]

[Sensor display with crosshairs, a small object near the center, and redaction bars.]

12/31/99 18:18:53
cover_up_reasoning: The document explicitly contains redactions, including a general '[redacted]' at the top and 'redaction bars' directly over the sensor display. While not extensive, these indicate specific information is being withheld beyond routine administrative markings.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局 (FBI) 于2025年向全域异常解决办公室 (AARO) 提交了一份关于不明异常现象 (UAP) 的报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑和删节。未提供随附的任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中的日期不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置所致。该单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，中央带有十字线分划板。一个由暗像素组成的小团块，形成一个物体，在分划板的正中心可见。
reported_object_description_zh: 一张单色、颗粒状图像中，在十字线分划板的正中心可见一个由暗像素组成的小团块，形成一个物体。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅提供了一张低质量、颗粒状的单色图像，显示一个小型像素化物体位于十字线中心。没有关于行为、运动学或佐证传感器数据或目击者的描述。这种缺乏细节和佐证的情况使得无法排除众多世俗解释，从而使其明确属于高度可解释的范畴。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确包含删节内容，包括顶部的通用标记“[已删节]”以及传感器显示屏上方的“删节条”。尽管不广泛，但这些表明除了常规行政标记之外，有特定信息被隐瞒。
claims: FBI submitted a report of a UAP to AARO
Still image derived from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
Accompanying mission report was not provided
Operator unable to positively identify the UAP
Image date 12/31/99 is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
Monochrome image displays grainy texture with central crosshair reticle
Small cluster of dark pixels, forming an object, visible at the exact center of the reticle
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
源自美国军事系统的静态图像
原始图像经过了编辑和删节
未提供随附的任务报告
图像日期12/31/99不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置所致
单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，中央带有十字线分划板
一个由暗像素组成的小团块，形成一个物体，在分划板的正中心可见
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The object is described as a 'small cluster of dark pixels' in a 'monochrome, grainy image,' which is highly consistent with sensor noise or an optical artifact.
Distant bird, bat, or insect: A small, dark, pixelated object without described kinematics could easily be a common animal at a distance, especially given the low image quality.
Distant aircraft or drone: A small, dark silhouette of a conventional aircraft or drone, particularly if far away or at an unusual angle, could appear as a cluster of pixels in a grainy image.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影：该物体被描述为一张“单色、颗粒状图像”中的“一小团暗像素”，这与传感器噪声或光学伪影高度一致。
远处的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫：一个没有描述运动学特征的小型、黑暗、像素化物体，在远处很容易是普通动物，特别是考虑到图像质量较低。
远处的飞机或无人机：一架常规飞机或无人机的小型、黑暗剪影，特别是如果距离遥远或角度异常，在颗粒状图像中可能显示为一团像素。
cover_up_indicators: '[redacted]' at the beginning of the document
cover_up_indicators_zh: 文件开头的“[已删节]”标记
传感器显示屏上方的“删节条”
